name: autoupdated-anthropic-documentation-knowledge
description: Multi-skill verification toolchain for the Anthropic docs skills platform. Per-skill content lives at skills/<name>/; this package.json only carries the devDeps for the shared pipeline/scripts/ verification gates.

scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:examples && npm run verify:templates && npm run verify:populated && npm run verify:diff-size && npm run verify:docs-drift && npm run verify:sanitizer-parity && npm run verify:gate-parity && npm run verify:change-report-parity && npm run verify:agent-tests
